'''Cadinth''' was one of the original worlds in the [[Kingdom of Cron]], and later [[Xim's empire]]. At the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Cadinth was a wealthy port and desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]]. Its natural beauty was destroyed by industrialization, as was that of its neighbor, [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]], leaving deserts of black sands and howling winds. Scattered in the wastes were the ruins of ancestral civilizations. Its population was concentrated in gloomy, sharp-featured cities that self-consciously evoked the distant past.

==History==
Prior to [[25,150 BBY]], Cadinth was the capital world of one of the ancient Tion Cluster states: the [[Kingdom of Cadinth]]. Cadinth later allied with the Kingdoms of [[Kingdom of Jaminere|Jaminere]] and [[Kingdom of Barseg|Barseg]], creating the [[Three Allied Kingdoms]]. [[Pirate King/Legends|Pirate King]] [[Xer VIII]] waged a campaign against the kingdoms between 25,150 BBY and [[25,130 BBY]], defeating the Kingdom of Cadinth at the [[Battle of Cadinth (Xer's Campaigns)|Battle of Cadinth]]. Cadinth and the Three Allied Kingdoms worlds were conquered and absorbed into [[Kingdom of Cron|Xer's Empire]], and later [[Xim's empire]]. Thus it became the Third Throne world of Xim.<ref name="Xim Week" />

After the collapse of the empire in [[25,100 BBY]], the world joined the ancient [[Kingdom of Cron]]. After the [[Tionese War]], Cadinth and the entire Tion Cluster joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In the Republic's final years, the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] worlds joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]], and were later subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

The [[Cadinth Oligarchy]] decided that the planet would remain "firmly undecided" between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. Cadinth was later the site of the [[Battle of Cadinth]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' places Cadinth in the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]], but [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 55]] places it in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].
